'''Vol Barad''' was the [[Deputy President]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] and revealed the news to the citizens of Corellia of [[President/Legends|President]] [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'s [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]].

{{Char-stub}}
